envelope_defaults.human_readable_summary: Plan templates describe what an organization has purchased — entitlement only, not authority. Every plan includes DMW baseline + safety baseline + audit baseline. Customers should not pay extra just to have memory be safe.
envelope_defaults.model_usage_notes: Plans entitle availability; Foundation governance authorizes activation. Plans are STATIC catalog templates — never runtime billing state. Never quote pricing as final or contractual. Never gate Foundation safety/audit/DMW baseline behind a plan.

items.name: Starter / Pilot
items.description: Entry plan for evaluation, small teams, and pilot deployments. Includes the canonical $250/month base + Dandelion Preview + baseline Admin Twin guidance + baseline audit + baseline DMW + limited workflow recommendations. No advanced connector writes. No payment provider runtime yet.
items.human_readable_summary: Starter / Pilot. $250/month base. Baseline DMW included. Dandelion Preview. Limited seats. Foundation safety + audit baseline never paywalled.
items.model_usage_notes: Treat Starter / Pilot as evaluation entitlement. Do not assume the customer has any advanced capability pack, any premium DMW governance, any active connector pack, or any executed workflow runtime.
items.governance_notes: Even at Starter / Pilot, Foundation governance, audit chain integrity, DMW baseline safety, and same-org boundary remain absolute. Billing does not weaken governance.
items.billing_notes: Plan_id: starter-pilot. Base: $250/month suggested internal anchor. Future B3 may add usage caps. Final public pricing is product-team-decided; never claim contractual pricing here.
audit_expectations: future B3+ runtime emits PLAN_* discriminators via ADMIN_ACTION; no new audit literal in B2
items.target_customer: pilot teams, evaluation deployments, small orgs

included_usage_allowances.strategy: limited_pilot_allowances; specific quotas defined at future B3+

items.downgrade_behavior: Per docs/entitlement-catalog/downgrade-policies.json — never deletes audit history, never violates retention, never breaks evidence integrity.

items.name: Team
items.description: Standard team plan. $250 base + per-seat. Standard / Professional Twin seats. Collaboration Pack candidate. Basic workflow recommendations. Baseline DMW. Basic audit.
items.human_readable_summary: Team. $250 base + seats. Standard / Professional Twin seats. Collaboration Pack candidate. Baseline DMW + audit.
items.model_usage_notes: Team entitles Collaboration Pack candidacy + basic workflow recommendations. Connector activation still requires Foundation governance approval and map-region approval per ADR-0082 + ADR-0084.
items.governance_notes: Connector pack entitlement makes a connector available; it does not authorize activation. Map-region approval + admin policy approval still required.
items.billing_notes: Plan_id: team. Base: $250/month + per-seat suggested internal anchors per docs/entitlement-catalog/seats.json. Final public pricing is product-team-decided.

included_usage_allowances.strategy: team_tier_allowances; specific quotas defined at future B3+

items.downgrade_behavior: Per docs/entitlement-catalog/downgrade-policies.json. Safety + audit + DMW baseline preserved.

items.name: Business
items.description: Business plan. More seats. Admin Twin + Dandelion Activation Pack + connector packs + Agent Playground + advanced audit + workflow recommendations / proposed actions + DMW governance baseline + selected premium controls.
items.human_readable_summary: Business. Admin Twin. Dandelion Activation Pack. Connector packs. Agent Playground. Advanced audit. DMW governance baseline.
items.model_usage_notes: Business plan entitles broader connector pack availability + Agent Playground + advanced audit. Activation still gated by Foundation governance + map-region approval per ADR-0082.
items.governance_notes: Entitlement scales availability; governance still authorizes every activation. Dual-control may still apply for risky writes regardless of plan tier.
items.billing_notes: Plan_id: business. Annual or monthly commercial structure per future product-team decision. Final public pricing not in this catalog.

included_usage_allowances.strategy: business_tier_allowances; specific quotas defined at future B3+

items.downgrade_behavior: Per docs/entitlement-catalog/downgrade-policies.json. New premium actions may stop; audit + DMW + safety preserved.

items.name: Enterprise
items.description: Custom annual enterprise plan. Executive seats + board seats + advanced DMW governance + regulated evidence pack + custom connectors + SSO / SAML / SCIM + custom retention + premium support + SLA.
items.human_readable_summary: Enterprise. Custom annual. Executive + board seats. Advanced DMW governance. Regulated evidence pack. SSO/SAML/SCIM. Custom retention. SLA.
items.model_usage_notes: Enterprise entitles broad capability pack + add-on availability. Final commercial terms are negotiated. Governance + audit + DMW safety remain absolute regardless of contract.
items.governance_notes: Enterprise customers do not get to opt out of Foundation governance, audit chain integrity, same-org boundary, or DMW safety baseline. Custom retention extends — never reduces — required retention.
items.billing_notes: Plan_id: enterprise. Custom annual contract. Pricing negotiated per opportunity. No public price claim in this catalog.
audit_expectations: regulator-view per ADR-0036 LawfulBasis when applicable

included_usage_allowances.strategy: custom_negotiated_at_contract; specific quotas defined per enterprise opportunity

items.downgrade_behavior: Per docs/entitlement-catalog/downgrade-policies.json + enterprise_contract_end_policy. Audit + DMW + safety + legal hold preservation absolute.
